overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character interacting with and moving through a clothing vendor's stall in a bustling cyberpunk market. The scene features industrial architecture, digital billboards, and transitions from the shaded interior of the stall to the sunlit street outside.

events.description: brief blackout occurs with 'Talk' UI prompt appearing at bottom of screen

agents.ego_description: standing in front of the vendor, facing him directly with minimal movement

notable_agents.action: vendor standing with arms crossed, wearing white shirt and tan apron, looking at the player

entered.detail: headless white dress form on metal stand
metal rack with various jackets and shirts hanging including yellow and black garments
long rectangular fluorescent light fixtures mounted on the ceiling
industrial corrugated metal roofing of the market stall

segments.scene_description: The player stands facing a clothing vendor inside a covered market stall. The vendor stands with arms crossed in the center, while a white mannequin stands to the left and clothing racks fill the middle ground. Overhead fluorescent lights illuminate the industrial metal structure of the stall.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitioning from stall interior to open market street

events.description: player character begins walking forward through the clothing stall
approaching the stall entrance, view opens to the sunlit street outside with visible pedestrians and large digital billboards

agents.ego_description: walking through the clothing stall, passing the vendor and moving toward the street entrance while observing the merchandise

notable_agents.action: vendor remains stationary with arms crossed as the player moves past him toward the exit
several pedestrians walking along the sunlit street outside the stall entrance

entered.detail: white curtain or fabric partition hanging from the metal stall structure
large digital screen displaying 'DEATH WARNING' text with red and white graphics
large digital advertisement displaying 'GOT CHROME?' text with futuristic graphics
opening of the stall leading to the bright outdoor market street

segments.scene_description: The player moves through the clothing stall, passing by racks of garments and the stationary vendor on the left. The camera advances toward the stall entrance where bright daylight reveals a busy street outside. Large digital billboards displaying 'DEATH WARNING' and 'GOT CHROME?' advertisements become visible above the street, and pedestrians can be seen walking in the open market area beyond.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the shaded interior of a clothing stall out into the bright, chaotic energy of a cyberpunk street. It begins facing a vendor with crossed arms inside a covered market, where fluorescent lights illuminate an industrial metal structure and rows of clothing racks. As the camera advances, it glides past the stationary vendor and through the garments toward the stall's entrance. The scene then opens into a sunlit open market, where the dim interior light shifts to brilliant daylight. Finally, the view expands to reveal a busy street filled with pedestrians and towering digital billboards flashing advertisements for death warnings and chrome enhancements.
